meta.title: Lockheed's spending BILLIONS on a SECRET AIRCRAFT (Is it the SR-72?)
meta.description:
Make sure to go to https://www.recwatches.com/timepieces/habu/ and use PROMO CODE: SAND to get an extra 10% off your own HABU timepiece! 

— BREAK —

Lockheed Martin may be having a tough year, losing out on new Air Force and Navy fighter contract opportunities in March and announcing $1.6 billion in Quarter 2 losses in July, but this legendary aircraft manufacturer still has at least one technological ace up its sleeve — a highly classified aeronautics program that Lockheed CEO Jim Taiclet describes as a “game-changing capability.” 

Let's talk about the possibility that this "game-changing" new aircraft could be none other than the legendary SR-72.
